findings.message: README documents every skill as a /conductor:<name> slash command but the repo ships no commands/ directory, only skills/conductor-*/SKILL.md
Vague quantifier 'properly' used without measurable criteria
Vague quantifier 'relevant' used without measurable criteria
Vague quantifier 'appropriate' used without measurable criteria
Complex multi-phase branching protocol (handshake, track selection, doc-sync approval loop) has no dedicated worked example, only bare commit-message templates
The 'exact curl command sequence' the agent is told to run verbatim is collapsed into an unusable, syntactically broken one-liner
Identical unpinned-fetch gap as conductor-setup/SKILL.md, duplicated in this skill's own installation step

Skill installation curls a mutable main-branch URL and writes it into .agents/skills/ while claiming commit-SHA pinning that is never actually implemented

Vague quantifier 'relevant' used without measurable criteria
Vague quantifier 'relevant' used without measurable criteria
Vague quantifier 'properly' used without measurable criteria
File contains zero worked examples of any kind despite enumerating 7 required output fields for the final status report

The 'exact curl command sequence' the agent is told to run verbatim is collapsed into an unusable, syntactically broken one-liner — line 126 is a single inline-code span 'bash mkdir -p .agents/skills/<skill_name> curl -sSL <URL>SKILL.md -o .agents/skills/<skill_name>/SKILL.md' with no fencing/newlines, unlike the correctly fenced ```bash block for the identical instruction at conductor-setup/SKILL.md:182-187

Skill installation curls a mutable main-branch URL and writes it into .agents/skills/ while claiming commit-SHA pinning that is never actually implemented — assets/catalog.md URLs all end in '.../main/skills/<name>/' (mutable branch ref, no commit SHA); no step in the SKILL.md resolves or embeds a SHA before the curl -o call, despite the same section's text promising installation 'as a frozen version (commit <sha>)' at line 174/180

Identical unpinned-fetch gap as conductor-setup/SKILL.md, duplicated in this skill's own installation step — Same assets/catalog.md URLs ('.../main/skills/<name>/', no commit SHA) and same unfulfilled 'frozen version (commit <sha>)' promise at line 124, with no SHA-resolution step anywhere in the file

File contains zero worked examples of any kind despite enumerating 7 required output fields for the final status report
README documents every skill as a /conductor:<name> slash command but the repo ships no commands/ directory, only skills/conductor-*/SKILL.md

Two skills each carry their own full copy of the same skill catalog with no shared source, risking silent drift — skills/conductor-new-track/assets/catalog.md and skills/conductor-setup/assets/catalog.md are byte-identical
